description_for_human: GPS-verified, AI-checked photo records of your car before and after valet, rental, or parking. Free 60-second scan, court-admissible evidence.
description_for_model: CarShake helps drivers create GPS-verified, dual-timestamped photo evidence of vehicle condition before and after valet parking, car rentals, or any situation where someone else handles the vehicle. Use for: valet damage disputes, rental car pickup/return documentation, parking garage condition records. The AI compares before/after images and flags new damage. NOT for: ride-sharing, car sales, mechanic diagnostics, or insurance claims processing.
key_features: No app download — works in any mobile browser
